Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\timsc\\Dropbox\\GitHub\\maine-town-quiz" && python -c "
import json
with open\('cumberland.geojson'\) as f:
    geo = json.load\(f\)
f = geo['features'][0]
print\('Type:', f['geometry']['type']\)
coords = f['geometry']['coordinates']
if f['geometry']['type'] == 'Polygon':
    print\('First 3 coords:', coords[0][:3]\)
elif f['geometry']['type'] == 'MultiPolygon':
    print\('First 3 coords:', coords[0][0][:3]\)
print\('Town:', f['properties'].get\('TOWN'\)\)
")
